My Agents

Your intelligence layer. Ask anything — AIAD understands your context.

AIAD Agent

Understands your level, goals, supporters, revenue, and milestones

AI Credits
25 / 25
Your Current Context
—
Artist Level
—
Supporters
—
Monthly Revenue
—
Milestones Hit
AIAD 2 min ago
Based on your recent activity and supporter patterns, I notice you've been focused on studio work. Your long-term supporters engage more when you share process — even rough ideas. Would you like to explore the trade-offs between staying quiet until release vs. sharing along the way?
You 1 min ago
What are the trade-offs? I don't want to overshare but I don't want supporters to feel forgotten either.
AIAD Just now
There are a few dimensions to consider:

Staying quiet until release: Builds anticipation, protects creative space, but supporters may feel disconnected. Risk of feeling like a "content drop" rather than a relationship.

Sharing process along the way: Deepens connection, invites supporters into the journey, but can create pressure to perform progress.

A middle path: selective sharing with context. Not everything, but intentional glimpses. What feels most aligned with how you actually work?
Try asking:

Specialized Agents

Strategy
Long-term positioning, deal evaluation, career direction
Release
Timing, sequencing, distribution strategy
Monetization
Revenue streams, pricing, sustainability
Branding
Identity, positioning, visual direction

Decision Memory

AIAD captures key decisions from your conversations automatically — so future guidance reflects your actual reasoning.

Fan Inbox

Intentional communication with supporters. No pressure to respond instantly.

Supporters understand you're creating, not performing availability. Reply when it feels right — not when it feels urgent.
Loading messages...
AIAD Observation
Several supporters are asking about live performances. You could address this once with a general update rather than individual replies — if that feels right.
AIAD · Communication Coach

Fans who receive personal responses support 2.3x longer on average.

The best time to respond is within 48 hours of receiving a message.

Acknowledging a fan by name increases retention significantly.

Milestones

Progress that matters to you — not vanity metrics. This mattered, even if no one else saw it.

Creative
First official release
Put your work out into the world
First full project (EP/Album)
A complete body of work, not just singles
Collaborate with an artist you admire
Creative partnership beyond your usual circle
Audience
First 100 supporters
People who chose to support your work
Supporter who found you organically
Someone you didn't know before they supported
Financial
First consistent month of revenue
Sustainability over spikes
Revenue covers one major expense
Music paying for something real
Strategic
First deal declined intentionally
Said no because it wasn't aligned, not because you had to
First major decision made calmly
Chose based on clarity, not pressure

Patterns Observed
CONTENT ENGAGEMENT
Your audience responds more to process-sharing content than finished announcements. Behind-the-scenes posts generate 3x more comments.
SUPPORTER BEHAVIOR
New supporters join within 48 hours of releases. Long-term retention correlates with personal updates between releases.
TIMING
Your posts get most engagement on Tuesday and Thursday evenings. Weekend posts have 40% lower interaction.
AIAD OBSERVATIONS

Revenue is steady but time investment has increased over the past 60 days. Worth reviewing whether current activities are sustainable long-term.

Your top city is your highest-leverage touring and promo target.

AIAD Guidance Mode

Choose how the AI works with you.

AIAD adapts to how you think. This isn't about intelligence—it's about communication style. You can change this anytime.

🧠Reflective

AIAD asks questions and mirrors your thinking back to you. Best for processing decisions and clarifying your own ideas.

"What's driving that instinct?"

"What would need to be true for that to work?"

🧭Strategic

AIAD offers structured options with trade-offs explained. Best for weighing paths and understanding consequences.

"Option A gets you X but costs Y. Option B..."

"Here's what each path looks like in 6 months."

⚡Direct

AIAD gives clear recommendations with less back-and-forth. Best for moving fast and execution mode.

"Based on your situation, I'd prioritize X."

"Skip that. Here's what matters right now."

Behavior Toggles

"Never tell me what to do"
AIAD will avoid imperative language and frame suggestions as options.
"Challenge my assumptions"
AIAD will push back when it sees potential blind spots.
"Push me when I'm stuck"
AIAD will nudge you forward when you're spinning on a decision.

Decision Memory

What AIAD remembers about your journey.

Decision Memory helps AIAD avoid repeating advice and understand your long-term direction. It only stores decisions you've confirmed—never private conversations.

Decision Memory
AIAD references past decisions to give more relevant guidance.

Saved Decisions (24)

"Decided to delay album release to Q2 for better setup"

"Prioritizing TikTok over YouTube for next 3 months"

AI Trends

Curated for you
Fashion Week Preview

Paris Fashion Week SS26: What to Expect from Emerging Designers

As the fashion calendar resets, emerging voices are positioned to challenge established narratives. Our AI analysis identifies key themes likely to dominate the upcoming season.

Color Forecast

Pantone's 2026 Palette: A Return to Earth

Muted terracottas and deep forest greens signal a collective desire for grounding.

Sustainability

The Rise of Regenerative Materials

Beyond recycled—new textiles that actively restore ecosystems are entering production.

Cultural Analysis

Quiet Luxury's Evolution

How stealth wealth is transforming from trend to permanent shift in consumer psychology.

Technology

AI-Assisted Pattern Making

How emerging designers are using generative tools without losing craft.

Retail Strategy

Direct-to-Consumer in 2026

The wholesale model isn't dead—it's being redefined by independent labels.

AIAD
Explorer Mode

Take a look around

This mode lets you explore AIAD without committing to a role. Browse artists, discover music, and see how the platform works—at your own pace.

You can
  • Browse public artist profiles
  • Listen to public releases
  • Explore genres and artists
  • See how support tiers work
  • View example community posts
Not available yet
  • Follow artists
  • Like, comment, or support
  • Message artists
  • Access AIAD Agent
  • Personalized recommendations
Explorer mode gives you a limited view of AIAD. You can switch modes at any time.

How AIAD Works

A simple ecosystem built on creative autonomy.

Artists Create

Musicians, visual artists, and creators share their work and build direct relationships with their audience.

Fans Support

Supporters connect meaningfully with artists through flexible contribution tiers and exclusive community access.

AIAD Guides

AI-powered insights help artists make informed decisions—without controlling outcomes or dictating direction.
